calendar.matters:
Petition By Successor Trustee For Order Confirming Ownership Of Trust Assets
Off Calendar Nov-08-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Roger Gross for Richard Black.

The Court stated that the petition before it today deals with two accounts, that the Court does not have an issue with account #10123, that it is a very different story with regard to account #10880 which was not open at the time that the trust was executed, that nothing had concluded with regard to account #10880 prior to the trustor's passing, and that it is not clear that it would have been okay even under the Power of Attorney. Mr. Gross stated that Mr. Black died before the matter was resolved. The Court stated that it was not inclined to grant the petition as to account #10880 and that the account could be collected by way of a small estate affidavit. The Court then granted the Petition by Successor Trustee for Order Confirming Ownership of Trust Assets as to account #10123 only. (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: M. Nuque. Matter not reported.
